summary: End-of-session knowledge propagation: inventory changes, classify, present plan, write KB docs, write session log, report.

content.description: Orchestrates end-of-session knowledge propagation and session logging.

steps.name: Inventory
steps.instruction: List what changed: decisions, state changes, artifacts, learnings. Skip implementation details.

steps.name: Classify
steps.instruction: For each item: determine type, lifecycle, tags, id. Check index for existing docs to update.

steps.name: Present plan
steps.instruction: Show the user: new docs, updates, skipped items, commit strategy. Wait for approval.

steps.name: Execute
steps.instruction: Write JSON docs to KB following schema. Stage exact files. Commit with clear message.

steps.name: Write session log
steps.instruction: Write a session-log doc to .leo/kb/logs/ using this template: {id: 'session-YYYY-MM-DD-XXXX', type: 'session-log', lifecycle: 'state', scope: 'project', tags: ['session-log'], content: {session_id: (same as id), timestamp: (now), repo: (repo name), communication_mode: (active mode from config), wrap_up_revisions: (count of rejected plans), tasks: [{task_id, timestamp, summary, tags}]}}. Create .leo/kb/logs/ directory if it doesn't exist. Session-logs are NOT indexed and NOT loaded at boot.

steps.name: Report
steps.instruction: Brief report: commit SHA, files changed, session log written, deferred items.

do_not: Run without explicit trigger from user
Manufacture propagation when inventory is empty
Load or read session-log docs — monitoring is external
